---
title: "Résumé"
---


# Professional Summary

Results-oriented marketing and analytics professional with a strong foundation in data analysis, digital strategy, and performance reporting. Skilled in leveraging analytics tools and programming languages to uncover insights and support decision-making across cross-functional teams.

# Technical Skills

- **Tools:** Qualtrics, Looker Studio, Tableau, Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, ArcGIS, Monday.com 
- **Technical:** R, SQL, WordPress, HTML, CSS, WCAG
- **Methods:** Data Visualization, A/B Testing, Customer Segmentation, Market Research, Campaign Analysis, SEO Optimization, UX/UI Principles, Theme Analysis, Crosstab Analysis

# Education

| Degree                             | Year              | Institution  |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ------------------- |
| MS In Digital Marketing and Analytics                     | 2024 – 2026 | California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, CA   |
| Bachelor of Business Administration (Honors) <br>*Major in Marketing* | 2020 – 2024 | Ahmedabad University, Gujarat, India   |

# Work Experience

### Data Analyst Assistant, 
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:0.75rem;"><strong style="color:black;">Associated Student Inc., Pomona, CA</strong><strong style="color:black;">Jun 2025 – Present</strong></div>

- Designed and deployed 6 cross-campus surveys using **Qualtrics** and **Excel**, achieved from 85% to 95% response rates and supporting data-driven decision-making across departments.
- Performed crosstab and segmented analysis on 450+ employees, identified key trends and delivering insights that improved engagement, with 79% reporting stronger connection to the organization.
- Led themes analysis of 400+ open-ended responses in **Dedoose**, to identify patterns in user behavior and translating findings into actionable recommendations across 10 teams.
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define research questions and success metrics and communicated insights through clear data storytelling to support decision-making.

---

### [Job Title], [Company or Organization]  
*[Start Date – End Date]*

- [Responsibility or accomplishment #1]  
- [Responsibility or accomplishment #2]  
- [Team leadership, training, or development]  
- [Projects involving marketing, data, or web technologies]  
- [Toolset used or strategies implemented]

---
